title: OpenEPCIS Battery Vocabulary
description:
Battery-specific vocabulary extending GS1 Web Vocabulary for Digital Product Passports.

A lightweight, 100% JSON-LD compatible alternative to BatteryPass/SAMM that covers all
EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 Annex XIII requirements while leveraging existing GS1 standards.

Aligned with:
- EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 Annex XIII
- DIN DKE SPEC 99100:2025-02
- GS1 Web Vocabulary (gs1:regulatoryInformation pattern)
- GS1 EPCIS 2.0 (gs1:masterDataAvailableFor)

GS1 Properties to Use (not redefined here):
- gs1:gtin - Global Trade Item Number
- gs1:netWeight / gs1:grossWeight - Battery weight
- gs1:manufacturingDate - Manufacturing date
- gs1:countryOfOrigin - Country of manufacture
- gs1:manufacturer - Manufacturer organization
- gs1:warranty / gs1:WarrantyPromise - Warranty information
- gs1:certification / gs1:CertificationDetails - Certifications
- gs1:regulatoryInformation - Regulatory compliance

For regulatory compliance data, use gs1:regulatoryInformation with gs1:RegulationTypeCode-BATTERY_DIRECTIVE.

EPCIS 2.0 Extension Declaration:
GS1-Extensions: eubat=https://ref.openepcis.io/extensions/eu/battery/

Extension Governance:
This vocabulary extends GS1 Web Vocabulary only where no equivalent term exists.
Each extension term includes dcterms:source, skos:note, and rdfs:seeAlso where applicable.
Battery categories can also be expressed via gs1:additionalProductClassification.

classes.label: Battery
classes.comment: A self-contained energy-storage device whose Digital Product Passport falls in scope of EU Regulation 2023/1542. Use as the primary `type` discriminator on a Battery product (typically paired with `gs1:Product` for canonical JSON-LD dual-typing, e.g. `"type": ["Product", "Battery"]`). Subclasses on eubat:batteryCategory (LMTBattery, EVBattery, IndustrialBattery, StationaryBattery, PortableBattery, SLIBattery) further qualify the category.

classes.label: Battery Chemistry
classes.comment: The electrochemical system of the battery including cathode, anode, and electrolyte materials.

classes.label: Battery Material
classes.comment: A material used in battery construction with its composition percentage, CAS/EC identifiers, and sourcing information.

classes.label: Carbon Footprint Declaration
classes.comment: Carbon footprint declaration for a battery including lifecycle breakdown and third-party verification.

classes.label: Dismantling Document
classes.comment: A document supporting battery dismantling, as specified in DIN DKE SPEC 99100.

classes.label: End of Life Information
classes.comment: Information required for safe handling, dismantling, and recycling at end of battery life.

classes.label: Hazardous Substance
classes.comment: A hazardous substance present in the battery, classified per EU CLP Regulation 1272/2008.

classes.label: Label
classes.comment: A label or marking on the battery as required by EU Battery Regulation Annex VI.

classes.label: Material Recovery Target
classes.comment: Recovery rate target or achievement for a specific material.

classes.label: Negative Event
classes.comment: An adverse event affecting the battery such as accident, damage, or safety incident.

classes.label: Power Capability at SoC
classes.comment: Power capability measurement at a specific state of charge level (80% or 20%).

classes.label: Recycled Content
classes.comment: Declaration of recycled material content in the battery with pre/post-consumer breakdown.

classes.label: Supply Chain Due Diligence
classes.comment: Supply chain due diligence information as required by EU Battery Regulation Art. 39.

classes.label: Technical Specification
classes.comment: Technical specifications of a battery including capacity, voltage, and performance parameters.

classes.label: Temperature Range
classes.comment: A temperature range specification with minimum and maximum values for a specific operating context.

classes.label: Third Party Verification
classes.comment: Third-party verification details for carbon footprint or other certified data.

properties.label: Absolute Carbon Footprint
properties.comment: Total carbon footprint in kg CO2e (not normalized per kWh).

properties.label: Anode Active Material
properties.comment: Chemical composition of the anode active material (e.g., graphite, silicon, lithium titanate).

properties.label: Test Condition: at State of Charge
properties.comment: State-of-charge test condition (0-1) at which a performance metric was measured. Annotates a measurement record.

properties.label: Audit Body
properties.comment: Name of the organization that conducted the supply chain audit.

properties.label: Authorized Service Centers
properties.comment: URL to list of authorized service centers.

properties.label: Battery Chemistry
properties.comment: The electrochemical system of the battery including cathode, anode, and electrolyte composition.

properties.label: Battery Mass
properties.comment: Net mass of the battery. Use unitCode 'KGM' (kilogram) per UN/CEFACT Rec 20. Sub-property of gs1:netWeight to keep GS1-first.

properties.label: Battery Model Identifier
properties.comment: Manufacturer-assigned identifier of the battery model, distinct from the human-readable eubat:batteryModel name. Required by the EU Battery Regulation Labelling Implementing Act and referenced in the carbon footprint declaration; enables every batch- and item-level attribute to be tied back to a model.

properties.label: Battery Passport Identifier
properties.comment: Unique identifier for the battery passport. Note: In this implementation, the primary identifier is the GS1 Digital Link (@id).

properties.label: Cadmium Symbol Required
properties.comment: Whether Cd symbol is required (cadmium > 0.002% by weight).

properties.label: Calculation Standard
properties.comment: Standard used for carbon footprint calculation (e.g., ISO 14067:2018).

properties.label: Capacity Fade
properties.comment: Capacity degradation as a percentage of rated capacity, computed as ((rated − remaining) / rated) × 100. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'P1' (percent).

properties.label: Capacity Fade Threshold
properties.comment: Capacity fade percentage at which battery reaches end of rated cycle life (typically 80%).

properties.label: Capacity Threshold for Exhaustion
properties.comment: SOCE percentage threshold below which the battery is considered exhausted.

properties.label: Capacity Throughput
properties.comment: Cumulative capacity throughput. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'AMP_HR'.

properties.label: Carbon Footprint Declaration
properties.comment: Carbon footprint declaration for the battery.

properties.label: Carbon Footprint Declaration ID
properties.comment: Unique identifier for the carbon footprint declaration.

properties.label: Carbon Footprint Geographic Scope
properties.comment: Geographic scope of the carbon footprint calculation.

properties.label: Carbon Footprint Performance Class
properties.comment: Performance class for carbon footprint (A-E).

properties.label: Carbon Footprint - Recycling
properties.comment: Carbon footprint share from end-of-life/recycling phase (may be negative credit).

properties.label: Carbon Footprint Study URL
properties.comment: URL to the full carbon footprint study document.

properties.label: Carbon Footprint Total
properties.comment: Total lifecycle carbon footprint in kg CO2e per kWh.

properties.label: CAS Number
properties.comment: Chemical Abstracts Service registry number.

properties.label: Cathode Active Material
properties.comment: Chemical composition of the cathode active material (e.g., LiNiMnCoO2, LiFePO4, LiCoO2).

properties.label: Cell Type
properties.comment: Physical form factor of the battery cells.

properties.label: CE Marking Indicator
properties.comment: Whether the battery bears CE marking.

properties.label: Certified Usable Energy
properties.comment: The certified usable energy capacity of the battery.

properties.label: Cobalt Recycled Share
properties.comment: Total percentage of recycled cobalt content.

properties.label: Compliance Status
properties.comment: Current regulatory compliance status of the battery.

properties.label: Component Location
properties.comment: Component location in the battery (cathode, anode, etc.).

properties.label: Concentration
properties.comment: Concentration of the hazardous substance as percentage.

properties.label: Conflict Mineral Free
properties.comment: Declaration that the battery is free from conflict minerals.

properties.label: C-Rate
properties.comment: Nominal charge/discharge rate relative to capacity (e.g., 1C = full charge in 1 hour).

properties.label: C-Rate Life Cycle Test
properties.comment: C-rate used for lifecycle testing.

properties.label: Critical Raw Materials Statement
properties.comment: Statement about critical raw materials content per EU CRM Act.

properties.label: Current Self-Discharging Rate
properties.comment: Current rate of self-discharge of the battery. Use unitCode 'P1' (percent) per UN/CEFACT Rec 20; period typically per month.

properties.label: Cycle Count
properties.comment: Number of full charge-discharge cycles. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'C62' (count).

properties.label: Dangerous Goods Packing Instructions
properties.comment: Packing instructions per IATA/ADR/IMDG regulations (e.g., PI965, PI966, PI967).

properties.label: Data Provider Certification
properties.comment: Certification or accreditation of the data provider.

properties.label: Data Quality Assessment
properties.comment: Assessment of data quality and completeness (A-E rating).

properties.label: Declaration of Conformity URL
properties.comment: URL of the EU Declaration of Conformity document. Sits on the cccev:Evidence referenced by eubat:euDeclarationOfConformity.

properties.label: Depth of Discharge in Cycle Life Test
properties.comment: Depth of discharge (DoD) percentage used for cycle life testing.

properties.label: Dismantling and Removal Information
properties.comment: Reference to the dismantling and removal instructions document required by EU Battery Regulation Annex VIII §B.

properties.label: Dismantling Documents
properties.comment: Documents supporting battery dismantling per DIN DKE SPEC 99100.

properties.label: Dismantling Instructions
properties.comment: Reference to dismantling instructions document for safe disassembly of the battery.

properties.label: Estimated Dismantling Time
properties.comment: Estimated time required for safe battery dismantling.

properties.label: Document Type
properties.comment: Type of dismantling document per DIN DKE SPEC 99100.

properties.label: Document URL
properties.comment: URL to the document.

properties.label: Due Diligence Policy URL
properties.comment: URL to the company's supply chain due diligence policy.

properties.label: Due Diligence Report URL
properties.comment: URL to the supply chain due diligence report (MANDATORY).

properties.label: EC Number
properties.comment: European Community number (EINECS/ELINCS) for chemical substances.

properties.label: Electrolyte Composition
properties.comment: Chemical composition of the electrolyte.

properties.label: Electrolyte Type
properties.comment: Type of electrolyte used (e.g., liquid organic, polymer gel, solid-state ceramic).

properties.label: End of Life Information
properties.comment: Information required for safe handling, dismantling, recycling, and disposal at end of battery life.

properties.label: Energy Throughput
properties.comment: Cumulative energy throughput. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'KWH'.

properties.label: Estimated Impact
properties.comment: Estimated impact of the temperature excursion on battery health.

properties.label: EU Declaration of Conformity
properties.comment: The EU Declaration of Conformity for this battery, modelled as a cccev:Evidence supporting the EU Battery Regulation requirements. Carries the document URL (eubat:declarationOfConformity), the declaration ID (eubat:euDeclarationOfConformityId), and the notified body that signed off (eubat:notifiedBody).

properties.label: EU Declaration of Conformity ID
properties.comment: Unique identifier of the EU Declaration of Conformity. Sits on the declaration (cccev:Evidence), not the product.

properties.label: Event Type
properties.comment: Type of negative event.

properties.label: Evolution of Self Discharge
properties.comment: Change in self-discharge rate. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'P1' (percent).

properties.label: Exceedance Threshold
properties.comment: Temperature threshold that was exceeded (°C).

properties.label: Exhaustion Threshold
properties.comment: SOCE percentage threshold for battery exhaustion.

properties.label: Expected Cycle Life
properties.comment: Expected number of full charge-discharge cycles under reference test conditions.

properties.label: Expected Lifetime
properties.comment: Manufacturer-declared expected service life of the battery. Use unitCode 'MON' (months) or 'ANN' (years) per UN/CEFACT Rec 20.

properties.label: Expected Lifetime Capacity Throughput
properties.comment: Total capacity throughput expected over battery lifetime in Ah. Use unitCode 'AMH' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Expected Lifetime Energy Throughput
properties.comment: Total energy throughput expected over battery lifetime in kWh. Use unitCode 'KWH' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Expected Lifetime (Years)
properties.comment: Expected calendar lifetime under normal operating conditions, in years.

properties.label: Expected Number of Cycles
properties.comment: Manufacturer-declared expected number of full cycles.

properties.label: Expected Remaining Cycles
properties.comment: Estimated remaining charge-discharge cycles.

properties.label: Expected Remaining Lifetime (Months)
properties.comment: Estimated remaining useful lifetime in months.

properties.label: Exposure Duration (Minutes)
properties.comment: Duration of temperature exposure in minutes.

properties.label: Exposure End Time
properties.comment: End time of the temperature exposure.

properties.label: Extended Warranty Available
properties.comment: Whether extended warranty is available for purchase.

properties.label: Extinguishing Agent
properties.comment: Recommended fire extinguishing agent for the battery.

properties.label: Facility Identifier
properties.comment: Unique identifier of the manufacturing facility (recommended: GS1 GLN). Sits on the oec:FacilityInformation referenced by eubat:manufacturingPlace.

properties.label: Functional Unit
properties.comment: Functional unit for carbon footprint measurement (e.g., 1 kWh of total energy throughput).

properties.label: Has Battery
properties.comment: Links a product to one or more batteries it contains or is equipped with. Use this property to associate electric vehicles, power tools, energy storage systems, or any other product with its battery or batteries. Defined as subproperty of schema:hasPart for semantic web interoperability.

properties.label: Hazard Class
properties.comment: CLP Regulation hazard classification.

properties.label: Hazard Impact
properties.comment: Description of the hazard impact.

properties.label: Hazardous Substances
properties.comment: Hazardous substances present in the battery.

properties.label: Incident ID
properties.comment: Unique identifier for the incident.

properties.label: Incident Report URL
properties.comment: URL to the full incident report.

properties.label: Incident Severity
properties.comment: Severity level of the incident.

properties.label: Information on Collection
properties.comment: URL to information about collection points and procedures.

properties.label: Initial Capacity
properties.comment: Measured capacity at commissioning (ILMD).

properties.label: Initial Energy
properties.comment: Measured energy at commissioning (ILMD).

properties.label: Initial Internal Resistance
properties.comment: Initial internal resistance at commissioning in Ohms. Use unitCode 'OHM' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Initial Self Discharge
properties.comment: Initial self-discharge rate as percentage per month.

properties.label: Inspector ID
properties.comment: Identifier of the inspector who assessed the incident.

properties.label: Internal Resistance
properties.comment: Battery internal resistance in Ohms. Use unitCode 'OHM' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Internal Resistance Increase
properties.comment: Percentage increase in internal resistance. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'P1' (percent).

properties.label: Is Critical Raw Material
properties.comment: Whether this material is on the EU Critical Raw Materials list.

properties.label: Is Substance of Concern
properties.comment: Whether this material is a Substance of Very High Concern (SVHC) per REACH.

properties.label: Label Meaning
properties.comment: Human-readable meaning of the label.

properties.label: Labels
properties.comment: Labels and markings on the battery per Annex VI.

properties.label: Label Subject
properties.comment: Subject matter of the label.

properties.label: Label Symbol
properties.comment: URL to the label symbol image.

properties.label: Language Code
properties.comment: ISO 639-1 language code.

properties.label: Last Data Update
properties.comment: Timestamp of the last update to the battery passport data.

properties.label: Lead Recycled Share
properties.comment: Total percentage of recycled lead content (combined pre- and post-consumer). The EU Battery Regulation does not require a pre/post split for lead, in contrast to lithium, cobalt, nickel; v1.3 of the BatteryPass-Ready longlist consolidated the two former v1.2 attributes (#43 + #47) into this single share.

properties.label: Lead Symbol Required
properties.comment: Whether Pb symbol is required (lead > 0.004% by weight).

properties.label: Lifecycle Stage
properties.comment:
Lifecycle stage for carbon footprint declaration, indicating which phase of the
product lifecycle the emissions data refers to (raw material extraction, production, distribution, or recycling).
Used in BatteryPass bridge context to map per-stage carbon footprint data.

properties.label: Lifetime Reference Test
properties.comment: URL or reference to the standard test used for lifetime determination.

properties.label: Lithium Recycled Share
properties.comment: Total percentage of recycled lithium content.

properties.label: Manufacturer Identifier
properties.comment: Unique identifier of the battery manufacturer (recommended: GS1 GLN). Sits on the oec:OperatorInformation that plays the Manufacturer role; distinct OperatorInformation instances may identify different operators (manufacturer vs. importer vs. distributor).

properties.label: Manufacturing Place
properties.comment: Location where the battery was manufactured. A oec:FacilityInformation (subClassOf gs1:Place) carrying GLN, certifications, and facility-specific identifiers.

properties.label: Material Composition
properties.comment: Materials used in battery construction with their percentages, locations, and critical raw material status. Aligned with schema:hasPart for semantic web interoperability.

properties.label: Material Recovery Targets
properties.comment: Recovery rate targets or achievements for specific materials.

properties.label: Material Supplier
properties.comment: Name or identifier of the material supplier.

properties.label: Maximum Charging Current
properties.comment: Maximum allowed charging current in Amperes. Use unitCode 'AMP' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Maximum Charging Power
properties.comment: Maximum allowed charging power in kW. Use unitCode 'KWT' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Maximum Discharging Current
properties.comment: Maximum allowed discharging current in Amperes. Use unitCode 'AMP' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Maximum Discharging Power
properties.comment: Maximum allowed discharging power in kW. Use unitCode 'KWT' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Maximum Permitted Battery Power
properties.comment: Maximum permitted battery power (single declared value). Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'WTT' (watt) or 'KWT' (kW), UN/CEFACT Rec 20.

properties.label: Maximum Voltage
properties.comment: Maximum allowable voltage when fully charged, in Volts (V). Use unitCode 'VLT' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Measurement Certificate URL
properties.comment: URL to the measurement certificate document.

properties.label: Minimum Voltage
properties.comment: Minimum allowable voltage to prevent deep discharge damage, in Volts (V). Use unitCode 'VLT' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Negative Events
properties.comment: Log of safety- or performance-relevant negative events recorded over the battery lifetime: accident, thermal event, deep discharge, short circuit, etc. Range is the existing eubat:NegativeEvent class.

properties.label: Next Scheduled Measurement
properties.comment: Date of next scheduled SOCE measurement.

properties.label: Nickel Recycled Share
properties.comment: Total percentage of recycled nickel content.

properties.label: Nominal Voltage
properties.comment: Nominal operating voltage of the battery pack in Volts (V). Use unitCode 'VLT' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Note
properties.comment: Additional note or comment about a measurement or event.

properties.label: Notified Body
properties.comment: The notified body that performed the conformity assessment for this battery. Modelled as cv:PublicOrganisation (SEMICeu CPOV) carrying its number, name, and contact details.

properties.label: Notified Body Name
properties.comment: Name of the notified body involved in conformity assessment. Sits on the cv:PublicOrganisation referenced by eubat:notifiedBody.

properties.label: Notified Body Number
properties.comment: Identification number of the notified body involved in conformity assessment. Sits on the cv:PublicOrganisation referenced by eubat:notifiedBody.

properties.label: Number of Cells
properties.comment: Total number of cells in the battery pack.

properties.label: Number of Full Cycles
properties.comment: Cumulative number of full equivalent cycles the battery has completed.

properties.label: Number of Modules
properties.comment: Number of modules in the battery pack.

properties.label: Economic Operator Identifier
properties.comment: Unique identifier of the economic operator (recommended: GS1 GLN, ESPR EOID per Article 77). Sits on the oec:OperatorInformation referenced by eubat:operatorInformation.

properties.label: Economic Operator Information
properties.comment: Non-identifier metadata of the economic operator responsible for the battery (Art. 38): name, postal address, contact point. The operator's identifier is carried separately by eubat:operatorIdentifier so the two can be exposed at different access levels (v1.3 separates them: identifier is restricted to authorities, information remains public).

properties.label: Operator Role
properties.comment: Role of the economic operator (manufacturer, importer, distributor, etc.).

properties.label: Original Power Capability
properties.comment: Original power capability at specific SoC levels (80% and 20%).

properties.label: Power Capability
properties.comment: Power capability value in kW at the specified SoC. Use unitCode 'KWT' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Power Capability at 20% SoC
properties.comment: Current power capability at 20% state of charge. Use unitCode 'KWT' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Power Capability at 80% SoC
properties.comment: Current power capability at 80% state of charge. Use unitCode 'KWT' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Power Capability Ratio
properties.comment: Ratio of rated power to rated energy (W/Wh).

properties.label: Power Fade
properties.comment: Power capability degradation as a percentage of original power capability, computed as ((original − remaining) / original) × 100. Use unitCode 'P1' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Previous Applications
properties.comment: Description of previous use cases if battery is repurposed.

properties.label: Putting Into Service
properties.comment: Date when the battery was first put into service.

properties.label: Rated Capacity
properties.comment: Rated capacity in Ampere-hours (Ah). Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'AMH'.

properties.label: Rated Energy
properties.comment: Rated energy in kilowatt-hours (kWh). Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'KWH'.

properties.label: Rated Maximum Power
properties.comment: Rated maximum power output in kW. Use unitCode 'KWT' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Recommended Action
properties.comment: Recommended follow-up action after the incident.

properties.label: Recovery Material
properties.comment: Material for which recovery rate is specified (e.g., lithium, cobalt, nickel, copper).

properties.label: Recovery Rate
properties.comment: Recovery rate percentage for the specified material.

properties.label: Recyclability Rate
properties.comment: Percentage of the battery (by weight) that can be recycled.

properties.label: Recycled Content
properties.comment: Declaration of recycled material content with breakdown by material type and pre/post-consumer sources.

properties.label: Remaining Capacity
properties.comment: Current maximum capacity. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'AMP_HR'.

properties.label: Remaining Energy
properties.comment: Current maximum energy. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'KWH'.

properties.label: Remaining Power Capability
properties.comment: Current power capability measurements at various SoC levels.

properties.label: Remaining Round Trip Efficiency
properties.comment: Current round trip energy efficiency. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'P1' (percent).

properties.label: Remaining Usable Energy
properties.comment: The current remaining usable energy capacity.

properties.label: Renewable Content
properties.comment: Percentage of renewable content in the battery.

properties.label: Renewable Content Share
properties.comment: Percentage of this material derived from renewable sources.

properties.label: Repurposing Date
properties.comment: Date when the battery was repurposed.

properties.label: Repurposing Entity
properties.comment: Organization that performed the repurposing.

properties.label: Repurposing Guidelines
properties.comment: URL to guidelines for battery repurposing.

properties.label: Repurposing Potential
properties.comment: Assessment of battery suitability for second-life applications.

properties.label: Resistance Increase Threshold
properties.comment: Internal resistance increase percentage at which battery reaches end of rated cycle life.

properties.label: Responsible Sourcing Standard
properties.comment: Standard followed for responsible sourcing.

properties.label: Result of Test Report URL
properties.comment: URL to test report results.

properties.label: Risk Assessment Summary
properties.comment: Summary of the supply chain risk assessment findings.

properties.label: Round Trip Efficiency
properties.comment: Initial round-trip energy efficiency as percentage.

properties.label: Round Trip Efficiency at 50% Cycle Life
properties.comment: Expected round trip efficiency at 50% of rated cycle life.

properties.label: Round Trip Efficiency Fade
properties.comment: Degradation of round trip efficiency, computed as ((initial RTE − remaining RTE) / initial RTE) × 100. Use unitCode 'P1' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Round-Trip Energy Efficiency
properties.comment: Current round-trip energy efficiency on the 0-1 decimal scale (0.92 = 92%).

properties.label: Safety Instructions
properties.comment: URL to general safety instructions document.

properties.label: Safety Instructions for Dismantling
properties.comment: URL to specific safety requirements for battery dismantling.

properties.label: Safety Measures
properties.comment: End-of-life handling safety guidance: short text or URL fragment.

properties.label: Self Discharge Rate
properties.comment: Current self-discharge rate. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'P1' (percent per month).

properties.label: Separate Collection
properties.comment: URL to information about separate collection requirements.

properties.label: Separate Collection Symbol URL
properties.comment: URL to the crossed-out wheeled bin symbol.

properties.label: Proper Shipping Name
properties.comment: UN proper shipping name for dangerous goods transport.

properties.label: SOCE Measurement ID
properties.comment: Unique identifier for the SOCE measurement.

properties.label: Spare Parts
properties.comment: List of spare part component names available from this supplier.

properties.label: Spare Part Sources
properties.comment: Sources for spare parts for the battery.

properties.label: State of Certified Energy
properties.comment: SOCE ratio of remaining to certified usable energy. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'P1' (percent).

properties.label: State of Charge
properties.comment: Current charge level as percentage. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'P1' (percent).

properties.label: State of Charge Level
properties.comment: The SoC level at which power capability is measured (e.g., 80 or 20).

properties.label: State of Health
properties.comment: Battery state of health as percentage of original capacity. Use unitCode 'P1' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Substance CAS Number
properties.comment: Chemical Abstracts Service registry number for the hazardous substance.

properties.label: Substance EC Number
properties.comment: European Community number for the hazardous substance.

properties.label: Substance Location
properties.comment: Location of the hazardous substance in the battery.

properties.label: Supply Chain Due Diligence
properties.comment: Supply chain due diligence information per Art. 39.

properties.label: Supply Chain Index
properties.comment: Optional supply chain sustainability index score.

properties.label: Supply Chain Mapping Available
properties.comment: Whether detailed supply chain mapping is available.

properties.label: Technical Specifications
properties.comment: Technical performance specifications including capacity, voltage, power, and lifetime parameters.

properties.label: Temperature Excursion ID
properties.comment: Unique identifier for the temperature excursion event.

properties.label: Temperature Excursion Report URL
properties.comment: URL to the temperature excursion report.

properties.label: Temperature Range - Charging
properties.comment: Allowable temperature range during charging.

properties.label: Temperature Range - Discharging
properties.comment: Allowable temperature range during discharging.

properties.label: Temperature Range - Idle State
properties.comment: Temperature range for the battery in idle state.

properties.label: Temperature Range - Storage
properties.comment: Allowable temperature range for battery storage.

properties.label: Test Report Number
properties.comment: Identifier of the test report.

properties.label: Third Party Assurances URL
properties.comment: URL to third party verification or assurances.

properties.label: Third Party Verification
properties.comment: Third-party verification details for the carbon footprint declaration.

properties.label: Time Spent Charging During Extreme Temperatures Above Boundary
properties.comment: Cumulative time the battery spent charging above the upper temperature boundary, in minutes.

properties.label: Time Spent Charging During Extreme Temperatures Below Boundary
properties.comment: Cumulative time the battery spent charging below the lower temperature boundary, in minutes.

properties.label: Time Spent in Extreme Temperatures Above Boundary
properties.comment: Cumulative time the battery spent above the upper temperature boundary, in minutes.

properties.label: Time Spent in Extreme Temperatures Below Boundary
properties.comment: Cumulative time the battery spent below the lower temperature boundary, in minutes.

properties.label: Transportation Safety Class
properties.comment: UN transportation classification (e.g., UN3481, UN3480).

properties.label: Transport Conditions
properties.comment: Description of transport conditions during the event.

properties.label: Verification Body
properties.comment: Organization that performed the third-party verification.

properties.label: Verification Body Name
properties.comment: Name of the verification body.

properties.label: Verification Certificate URL
properties.comment: URL to the verification certificate document.

properties.label: Verification Date
properties.comment: Date when third-party verification was completed.

properties.label: Verification Standard
properties.comment: Standard used for verification (e.g., ISO 14064-3).

properties.label: Warranty Conditions
properties.comment: URL to warranty terms and conditions. For warranty duration, use gs1:warranty.

properties.label: Waste Prevention
properties.comment: URL to waste prevention information.

enumerations.label: Data Access Level
enumerations.comment: Access restriction level for battery passport data per Annex XIII.

values.label: Authorities Only
values.comment: Data accessible only to notified bodies, market surveillance authorities, and the Commission.

values.label: Authorized Personnel
values.comment: Data accessible to authorized economic operators and service providers.

values.label: Public
values.comment: Data accessible to the general public without authentication.

enumerations.label: Battery Category
enumerations.comment: Categories of batteries as defined by EU Battery Regulation Art. 3.

values.label: Electric Vehicle Battery
values.comment: Traction battery for electric vehicles providing propulsion power. Subject to most stringent DPP requirements from 18 Feb 2027.

values.label: Industrial Battery
values.comment: Battery designed for industrial applications with capacity > 2 kWh, excluding LMT and EV batteries. Subject to DPP requirements from 18 Aug 2025.

values.label: Light Means of Transport Battery
values.comment: Battery for e-bikes, e-scooters, and other light electric vehicles. Subject to DPP requirements from 18 Feb 2027.

values.label: Portable Battery
values.comment: Sealed battery weighing 5 kg or less, not designed for industrial use. Not subject to DPP requirements.

values.label: Starting, Lighting, Ignition Battery
values.comment: Battery designed to supply electric power for starting, lighting, or ignition. Not subject to DPP requirements.

values.label: Stationary Energy Storage Battery
values.comment: Battery system for stationary energy storage applications such as grid services, backup power, or renewable energy storage.

values.label: Original
values.comment: Battery in its original state as manufactured, not yet subjected to any second-life operations.

values.label: Remanufactured
values.comment: Battery restored to original specifications through replacement of components and comprehensive testing.

values.label: Repurposed
values.comment: Battery adapted for a different application than originally intended (e.g., EV battery used for stationary storage).

values.label: Reused
values.comment: Battery used again for the same purpose after refurbishment or testing, without major component replacement.

values.label: Waste
values.comment: Battery at end-of-life designated for recycling or disposal per EU Battery Regulation requirements.

enumerations.label: Carbon Footprint Performance Class
enumerations.comment: Carbon footprint performance classification (A-E) per EU Battery Regulation.

values.label: Class A
values.comment: Best carbon footprint performance class.

values.label: Class E
values.comment: Lowest carbon footprint performance class.

enumerations.label: Cell Type
enumerations.comment: Physical form factor of battery cells.

values.label: Blade Cell
values.comment: Blade-shaped cell designed for cell-to-pack architecture.

values.label: Coin Cell
values.comment: Small disc-shaped cell (button cell format).

values.label: Cylindrical Cell
values.comment: Cylindrical cell format (e.g., 18650, 21700, 4680).

values.label: Pouch Cell
values.comment: Flexible pouch cell with laminate packaging.

values.label: Prismatic Cell
values.comment: Rectangular prismatic cell with hard casing.

enumerations.label: Compliance Status
enumerations.comment: Regulatory compliance status of the battery.

values.label: Compliant
values.comment: Battery fully complies with all applicable regulatory requirements.

values.label: Conditionally Compliant
values.comment: Battery complies subject to specified conditions or limitations.

values.label: Non-Compliant
values.comment: Battery does not meet one or more regulatory requirements.

values.label: Pending
values.comment: Compliance assessment is in progress.

enumerations.label: Component Location
enumerations.comment: Component location within the battery cell or pack where a material is used.

values.label: Anode
values.comment: Negative electrode where oxidation occurs during discharge. Typically contains graphite or silicon compounds.

values.label: Battery Management System
values.comment: Electronic components for battery monitoring and control.

values.label: Casing
values.comment: External housing and structural components of the battery pack including enclosures, frames, and thermal management elements.

values.label: Cathode
values.comment: Positive electrode where reduction occurs during discharge. Contains active materials like NMC, LFP, or NCA.

values.label: Current Collector
values.comment: Metallic foil that collects current from electrodes (typically aluminum for cathode, copper for anode).

values.label: Electrolyte
values.comment: Ion-conducting medium between electrodes. Can be liquid, gel, or solid-state depending on battery chemistry.

values.label: Separator
values.comment: Porous membrane preventing direct contact between electrodes while allowing ion transport.

enumerations.label: Dismantling Document Type
enumerations.comment: Types of documents supporting battery dismantling per DIN DKE SPEC 99100.

values.label: Bill of Material
values.comment: Structured list of all components and materials in the battery with quantities and identifiers.

values.label: Dismantling Manual
values.comment: Step-by-step instructions for safe disassembly of battery components for recycling or repair.

values.label: Drawing
values.comment: Technical drawings showing battery dimensions, connection points, and component locations.

values.label: 3D Model
values.comment: Three-dimensional CAD model showing battery structure, component layout, and assembly relationships.

values.label: Other Manual
values.comment: Other supporting documentation not covered by specific document types.

values.label: Removal Manual
values.comment: Instructions for safely removing the battery from its host device or vehicle.

values.label: Safety Data Sheet
values.comment: Safety data sheet (SDS) for the battery containing hazard and handling information.

enumerations.label: Hazard Class
enumerations.comment: Hazard classification categories per EU CLP Regulation.

values.label: Acute Toxicity
values.comment: Substances causing harmful effects after single or short-term exposure via oral, dermal, or inhalation routes.

values.label: Aspiration Hazard
values.comment: Liquid or solid substances causing chemical pneumonia or pulmonary injury if aspirated into airways.

values.label: Carcinogenicity
values.comment: Substances known or suspected to cause cancer in humans.

values.label: Eye Damage or Irritation
values.comment: Substances causing serious eye damage or reversible eye irritation upon contact.

values.label: Germ Cell Mutagenicity
values.comment: Substances that may cause heritable genetic mutations in human germ cells.

values.label: Hazardous to Aquatic Environment
values.comment: Substances posing acute or chronic toxicity risks to aquatic organisms and ecosystems.

values.label: Reproductive Toxicity
values.comment: Substances adversely affecting sexual function, fertility, or development of offspring.

values.label: Respiratory or Skin Sensitization
values.comment: Substances causing hypersensitivity of airways (asthma) or allergic skin reactions after exposure.

values.label: Skin Corrosion or Irritation
values.comment: Substances causing irreversible damage (corrosion) or reversible damage (irritation) to skin tissue.

values.label: Specific Target Organ Toxicity
values.comment: Substances causing non-lethal damage to specific organs after single or repeated exposure.

values.label: Critical
values.comment: Critical incident posing safety risks. Immediate removal from service required.

values.label: Major
values.comment: Major incident significantly affecting battery performance. Immediate inspection and potential replacement recommended.

values.label: Minor
values.comment: Minor incident with minimal impact on battery performance or safety. No immediate action required.

values.label: Moderate
values.comment: Moderate incident requiring monitoring and potential preventive maintenance.

enumerations.label: Label Subject
enumerations.comment: Subject matter categories for battery labels per EU Battery Regulation Annex VI.

values.label: Cadmium Content
values.comment: Cd symbol indicating cadmium content above threshold (> 0.002% by weight).

values.label: Capacity Label
values.comment: Label showing battery capacity in Ah and/or Wh.

values.label: Carbon Footprint
values.comment: Label displaying the carbon footprint class (A-E) and value per EU Battery Regulation requirements.

values.label: Extinguishing Agent
values.comment: Label indicating the recommended fire extinguishing agent for battery fires.

values.label: Lead Content
values.comment: Pb symbol indicating lead content above threshold (> 0.004% by weight).

values.label: Mercury Content
values.comment: Hg symbol indicating mercury content (prohibited except exemptions).

values.label: QR Code
values.comment: QR code providing access to the battery passport.

values.label: Separate Collection
values.comment: Crossed-out wheeled bin symbol indicating the battery must be collected separately from household waste.

enumerations.label: Material Category
enumerations.comment: Functional category of a battery material.

values.label: Active Material
values.comment: Electrochemically active material participating in charge/discharge reactions.

values.label: Additive
values.comment: Material added to improve performance, stability, or safety.

values.label: Binder
values.comment: Material binding active materials and conductors to current collector.

values.label: Conductor
values.comment: Material providing electronic conductivity (e.g., carbon black, carbon nanotubes).

values.label: Structural Material
values.comment: Material providing mechanical structure (casing, frames, etc.).

enumerations.label: Negative Event Type
enumerations.comment: Types of adverse events that can affect a battery.

values.label: Accident
values.comment: Physical accident involving the battery such as collision or drop.

values.label: Deep Discharge
values.comment: Discharge below minimum voltage limits.

values.label: Electrical Fault
values.comment: Electrical malfunction including BMS failure or cell imbalance.

values.label: Overcharge
values.comment: Charging beyond maximum voltage limits.

values.label: Physical Damage
values.comment: Mechanical damage to battery casing or internal components.

values.label: Short Circuit
values.comment: Internal or external short circuit event.

values.label: Thermal Event
values.comment: Thermal runaway, overheating, or fire incident.

values.label: Water Ingress
values.comment: Water or moisture penetration into the battery pack.

enumerations.label: Responsible Sourcing Standard
enumerations.comment: Standards for responsible sourcing of battery materials.

values.label: ASI Standard
values.comment: Aluminium Stewardship Initiative certification.

values.label: CIRA
values.comment: Cobalt Industry Responsible Assessment Framework.

values.label: Copper Mark
values.comment: The Copper Mark responsible production certification.

values.label: IRMA Standard
values.comment: Initiative for Responsible Mining Assurance standard.

values.label: OECD Due Diligence Guidance
values.comment: OECD Due Diligence Guidance for Responsible Supply Chains of Minerals from Conflict-Affected and High-Risk Areas.

values.label: Responsible Minerals Initiative
values.comment: Responsible Minerals Initiative (RMI) standards and assessments.
